backend/main.mo: Minimal Motoko backend actor with no logic or state, serving as a placeholder entry point.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (hex grid layout, Iron Command visual overhaul) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing their roles in the Pharaoh's Conquest auto-chess game.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the app titled 'Pharaoh's Conquest' that loads Google Fonts (Cinzel, EB Garamond) and mounts the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the app in QueryClient, ThemeProvider, and GameProvider, routing between MainMenu, the main gameplay layout, and GameOverScreen based on game state.
frontend/src/components/AnimalMesh.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/BattleBoard.tsx: SVG-based hex grid battle board rendering player and enemy sections with unit tokens, HP bars, drag-and-drop placement, coordinate labels, and selection highlighting using axial hex coordinates.
frontend/src/components/BattleLog.tsx: Scrollable panel that displays battle log entries during and after combat, auto-scrolling to the latest entry.
frontend/src/components/Bench.tsx: Renders the player's bench of reserve units as draggable cards with portraits, HP bars, star levels, and sell buttons, styled with a dark tactical command-panel aesthetic.
frontend/src/components/ControlPanel.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/EgyptianPanel.ts: Reusable decorative panel component with Egyptian-themed corner accents, gradient background, gold borders, and an optional titled header with hieroglyph decoration.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/GameHUD.tsx: Renders the in-game heads-up display showing round, HP bar, gold, level/XP bar, wins, losses, and streak stats, plus a back-to-menu button.
frontend/src/components/GameOverScreen.t: Displays the game-over or victory screen with final stats (rounds, wins, losses) and buttons to play again or return to the main menu.
frontend/src/components/GridTile.tsx: Renders a single grid cell on the battle board, handling drag-over/drop highlighting, friendly vs. enemy styling, and a decorative hieroglyph on empty friendly tiles.
frontend/src/components/HowToPlayModal.t: A modal dialog that explains game rules across six sections: preparation, combat, synergies, gold economy, win condition, and tips.
frontend/src/components/MainMenu.tsx: Renders the main menu screen with the game title, start button, and a How to Play modal that displays unit and synergy definitions.
frontend/src/components/Shop.tsx: Renders the in-game shop (Market of the Pharaoh) with purchasable unit cards, reroll/lock controls, a buy-XP button, and a start-battle/next-round action.
frontend/src/components/SynergyPanel.tsx: Displays active synergies from game state with count badges, active bonuses, and next-threshold hints, plus a collapsible reference list of all synergies.
frontend/src/components/Terrain.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/UnitCard.tsx: Renders a compact or full unit card with portrait, tier stars, HP bar, faction badges, cost, and a hover tooltip showing ability details.
frontend/src/components/UnitDetail.tsx: Shows detailed stats (HP bar, ATK, DEF, speed, cost) and sell/remove actions for the currently selected unit, using game state context.
frontend/src/components/UnitSprite.tsx: Renders a positioned unit sprite on the battle board with an HP bar, portrait image, tier stars, enemy tint, and smooth movement transitions.
frontend/src/data/synergies.ts: Defines the SYNERGY_DEFINITIONS array containing six faction synergies (Priest, Warrior, Nomad, Undead, Royal, Mystic) with thresholds and bonus descriptions.
frontend/src/data/units.ts: Defines unit types, the UnitDefinition interface, and the UNIT_DEFINITIONS array of Egyptian-themed units with stats, traits, abilities, and portrait URLs.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, handling both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) cases, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGameState.tsx: React context and hook providing full auto-battler game state management, including shop generation, enemy board generation, unit placement, and game phase transitions.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, wrapping DFINITY's AuthClient to expose login, logout, and identity state to React components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder file indicating that no backend queries are needed since game state is managed entirely on the frontend.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining custom design tokens (Egyptian/tactical theme colors) and reusable component classes for panels, buttons, and dark mode.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/types/game.ts: TypeScript type definitions for the auto-battler game, covering units, positions, shop slots, synergies, combat events, and overall game state.
frontend/src/utils/combatEngine.ts: Implements a per-tick combat simulation that processes attacks, damage, crits, and deaths for both friendly and enemy units, applying synergy buffs like undead regen and nomad attack speed.
frontend/src/utils/goldEconomy.ts: Utility functions for calculating gold income per round, interest on held gold, total income, and unit sell values.
frontend/src/utils/hexGrid.ts: Provides math utilities for a flat-top hexagonal grid (7×4), including hex-to-pixel conversion, SVG polygon point generation, and position index helpers.
frontend/src/utils/synergyCalculator.ts: Calculates active synergies from board units by counting faction members against thresholds, and maps those synergies to concrete stat buffs (magic bonus, armor reduction, attack speed, etc.).
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both regular and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence helpers for maintaining values like admin tokens across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with Egyptian and Iron Command design tokens (colors, fonts, shadows, animations) and enabling the animate, typography, and container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 7) describing the auto-chess game's architecture, existing features, known issues, and image asset requirements for an ancient Egyptian-themed auto-chess game.
